dialogues: Then you come in. "Why don't you loan her 5000?
...l'm a much bigger idiot than you are.
The aliens were always dropping in...
Oh, man. You know, you're crazy. You're a good-looking guy.
I got you an apartment in the building.
It's the thickness of the paint, but I'm aware of it.
Oh, this is gonna be great.
...but standing is good for jumping up and down.
She didn't have her wig on. It was horrifying.
- Yeah, the guy with the flat head. - He's a cube.
koreanHints: 1. 너 훨씬 더 멍청한 거 알지?
sessions.keyExpressions:
💡 핵심 표현:
- a much bigger idiot : '훨씬 더 바보'라는 뜻으로, much bigger를 사용해 비교급을 강조. a lot bigger, way bigger도 같은 용법
- you're crazy : 칭찬이나 놀림의 맥락에서 '너 미쳤어, 정신 나갔어'라는 뜻. 긍정적 뉘앙스로 자주 쓰임
- good-looking : 외모가 좋다는 표현. handsome, attractive보다 캐주얼하고 남녀 모두 사용 가능
- this is gonna be great : 앞으로 일어날 일에 대한 기대감 표현. gonna는 going to의 구어체

sessions.episode: How I Met Your Mother - S08E17  The Ashtray
dialogues: Art consultant. What's that?
and I want you to be completely honest.
- A harpoon gun? - A double-barreled harpoon gun!
Aldrin justice, baby.
All right. You were there. Tell me the story.
Still, he's being a jerk.
Oh, boy, that was a crazy story.
I mean, I get why he's mad. I did stick it to his ex-wife.
Oh, man. He seems pissed.
- I'm sorry. Where are my... - Manners.
koreanHints: 2. 좋아, 네가 거기 있었잖아. 그때 얘기 좀 해줘.
3. 그 사람 완전 화난 것 같은데.
sessions.keyExpressions:
💡 핵심 표현:
- be completely honest : 완전히 솔직해지다. 진심을 말하다. 상대에게 거짓 없이 있는 그대로 말해달라고 부탁할 때 쓰는 표현
- You were there : 네가 그 자리에 있었잖아. 현장에 있던 사람에게 증언이나 설명을 요구할 때 쓰는 자연스러운 표현
- seems pissed : 화난 것 같다. seem + 형용사로 추측을 나타내며, pissed는 angry보다 구어적이고 강한 표현
